movie.synopsis: Noise (2025) Ju-young is a young woman with a hearing impediment who decides to investigate her sister’s inexplicable disappearance, last seen in her apartment. Feeling more and more cornered, Ju-young begins to hear strange sounds and sense an evil presence in the apartment.
